name: shakshuka
instructions: saute yellow onions and bell peppers in olive oil. add garlic, paprika, cumin, aleppo pepper. add canned tomatoes, simmer until thick. make wells, crack eggs in, cover, cook until whites set but yolks runny. finish with parsley or cilantro and crumbled goat cheese.
notes: eggs poached into a tomato-pepper sauce. different egg pattern from frittata (eggs contain veg there; here veg contains eggs). feta is traditional but goat cheese works.
